product.title: B6 Complex - 60 capsules
product.description:
With enhanced B6 and active B vitamins

B6 Complex provides active B6 with vitamin B12, folate, other B vitamins and nutrients. Vitamin B6 is provided as pyridoxine and the activated form pyridoxal-5-phosphate. Vitamin B12 is provided as a combination of adenosylcobalamin and hydroxycobalamin. Featuring folate as L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate (L-5-MTHF), the naturally occurring universally metabolised form of folate. Vitamin B6 contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system. Vitamin B6 contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity.

product.description: Ultra Source of Life® with Lutein is a broad-spectrum micronutrient matrix delivered in an easily swallowed mini-tablet format. It combines highly bioavailable essential vitamins and minerals with a robust complex of amino acids, whole-food extracts, and fatty acids. This advanced biochemical formulation ensures the optimal cellular delivery of foundational nutrients, including naturally occurring lutein and cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3), to support systemic physiological pathways.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Balance Her Out™ - 120 capsules
product.description: Balance Her Out™ is a unique formula that contains extensively studied nutrients and herbs that have been shown to support female hormonal balance and healthy estrogen metabolism. Hormonal balance can play an important role in hair and skin vitality, elasticity, hydration, and radiance. It can influence hair follicle health and function and skin oil production, cellular health, and inflammatory responses. This formula harnesses the power of diindolylmethane (DIM), black cohosh, chaste tree extract, chrysin, and calcium D‐glucarate to promote healthy sex hormone balance and detoxification and antioxidant status, which are key factors in promoting luxurious hair and radiant skin.

product.description:
Sleep Complex capsules is a blend of botanicals, nutrients, and neurotransmitter precursors designed to support quality, restful sleep. By providing nutritional support for calm brain activity, Sleep Complex helps promote the body’s natural ability to fall asleep and stay asleep.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 - 120 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 provides a high-potency, synergistic blend of essential fat-soluble vitamins. Formulated with 5000 IU (125 mcg) of cholecalciferol, this supplement strategically pairs Vitamin D3 with Vitamin A (as retinyl palmitate) and Vitamin K2 (as menaquinone-7) to support physiological balance and normal calcium utilization. The inclusion of DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols provides a pure form of the vitamin E family. Delivered in a lipid base of safflower oil, these fat-soluble nutrients ensure optimal bioavailability and assimilation.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 - 60 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 is a high-potency, fat-soluble vitamin complex designed to deliver synergistic physiological support. By combining a concentrated dose of Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) with Retinyl Palmitate (Vitamin A), this formula ensures the proper balance of these critical nutrients, which interact closely in cellular receptor signaling. The addition of Menaquinone-7 (Vitamin K2) facilitates proper calcium utilization, contributing to the maintenance of normal bones, while DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols provide a specialized form of vitamin E to support cellular protection against oxidative stress. Encapsulated in a vegetarian softgel within a safflower oil base, this supplement optimizes the bioavailability of its fat-soluble constituents.

product.title: MethylPro® Vitamin D-3 5000IU - 90 capsules
product.description: This high-potency supplement features Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3), the biologically active form of Vitamin D naturally synthesized by the body upon skin exposure to UV light. Vitamin D is an essential fat-soluble nutrient that contributes to the normal absorption and utilization of calcium and phosphorus, supporting the maintenance of normal bones and teeth. Additionally, Vitamin D plays a crucial role in the normal function of the immune system and the process of cell division. This professional-grade formula is complemented by Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) to support physiological functions and ensure formulation stability.

product.title: Source of Life® - 90 Mini Tablets
product.description:
What is Source of Life®?
Source of Life products are based on a nutritionally balanced combination of vitamins, minerals, secondary plant substances, herbal and wholefood concentrates. There are special compositions for the requirements of special life situations, such as pregnancy, or certain groups of people such as men and women. In addition, iron-free variants of the products are also offered. Source of Life has been one of the best-selling multinationals in the U.S. market since 1986. 
This basic formula from Source of Life® is a convenient multivitamin combination that contains a wide range of nutrients in a compact form: vitamins, minerals and bioactive compounds in synergistically coordinated dosages for optimal support of daily nutrition.
Extra energy
To support energy levels, Source of Life® contains a broad spectrum of B vitamins, including B12 and B2 (riboflavin). In addition, it contains the antioxidants vitamin C, vitamin E, zinc and selenium, which protect the body from environmental aggressors. Vitamin D3 contributes to the normal function of the immune system and supports the bones as well as the muscles.
Source of Life®as a mini tablet
Source of Life® by NaturesPlus is a comprehensive multivitamin with vitamins, minerals and bioactive compounds from whole food concentrates. The product contains 90/180/360 mini tablets per pack.
Discover our other
Multivitamins
Hint:
Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: P-5-P - 120 capsules
product.description: Vitamin B6 is found in three forms: pyridoxine hydrochloride, pyridoxal, and pyridoxamine, all of which must be converted into activated pyridoxal-5-phosphate (P-5-P) by the liver. P-5-P is the form of vitamin B6 the body ultimately uses and is necessary for a wide range of actions, including the production of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA), for the conversion of 5-HTP to serotonin, and also for the decarboxylation of levodopa (L-Dopa) to dopamine. Vitamin B6 is also needed for glucose production and amino acid and lipid metabolism.

product.title: Acnutrol™ - 180 capsules
product.description: Acnutrol™ is formulated to provide comprehensive support for healthy skin. The key ingredients are pantothenic acid and carnitine. Pantothenic acid plays a significant role in maintaining keratinocytes, the predominant cell type in the skin’s epidermis. It also promotes normal lipid metabolism and may affect the skin’s balance of oils. Carnitine helps pantothenic acid work more efficiently in lipid metabolism and is necessary for normal cellular repair. Additional skin-supportive nutrients include zinc, copper, selenium, chromium, niacin, biotin, and vitamins B6, A, D, and Vitamin E Isomers.

product.description: D-Evail™ 10K is Designs for Health's highest potency vitamin D product, providing a clinically relevant serving of 10,000 IU (250 mcg) of vitamin D in a highly absorbable form alongside vitamins K1 (as phytonadione) and K2 (as MK-4), and geranylgeraniol (GG) to support bone, immune, and cardiovascular health. Research suggests that combined supplementation of both vitamins D and K may be more supportive than either vitamin alone for both bone and cardiovascular health. This product uses the Designs for Health Evail™ technology that combines quillaja extract with medium-chain triglycerides (MCT) for improved nutrient bioavailability.

product.title: ADK Evail™ - 60 softgels
product.description:
ADK Evail™ is a fat-soluble vitamin supplement featuring 5,000 international
units (IU) of vitamin D, in addition to beneficial amounts of vitamin A,
vitamin K, and vitamin E isomers (tocotrienols) in one convenient softgel
capsule. These vitamins work together to help promote bone, heart, and
immune health.*
This formula is designed to help support fat-soluble vitamin balance in the
body.* It is very important to keep supplemental intake of the fat-soluble
vitamins in balance with each other to help them function properly in the
body. Supplementing with high doses of one fat-soluble vitamin alone can
create an imbalance that disrupts essential interactions with other fatsoluble vitamins.
In addition, ADK Evail™ is made using the Designs for Health Evail™
technology to promote maximum nutrient absorption and delivery in
the body. This process utilizes quillaja extract (from bark of the Quillaja
saponaria tree) and is a patented form of geranylgeraniol (GG-Gold™)
extracted from annatto seeds.
Ingredient Highlights
• Supplies vitamin D as cholecalciferol (D3), the same type of vitamin D
made in the skin from sun exposure
• Provides preformed vitamin A as retinyl palmitate, a readily usable
form in the body
• Offers multipronged vitamin K support, including K1 (phytonadione)
and K2 (menaquinone-4 or MK-4), plus geranylgeraniol (GG), which
is a building block of K2
• Includes vitamin E isomers as DeltaGold® delta and gamma tocotrienols, which are naturally derived
Ingredient Functions
Vitamin D helps regulate the absorption and use of calcium to promote strong bones and teeth.* Vitamin D also
helps to regulate immune system responses in the body.* Lower blood levels of vitamin D are associated with an
increased risk for respiratory infections.*
Vitamin A helps support eye, bone, and thyroid gland health.* In addition, vitamin A promotes the health of the
skin and the linings of the respiratory and digestive tract, which are part of the body’s frontline defense against
unwanted organisms.*
Vitamin E isomers, including delta and gamma tocotrienols, are important members of the vitamin E family.
Tocotrienols may help support bone health and have high antioxidant activity.* Antioxidants help neutralize free
radicals, which can damage the body’s cells.*
Vitamin K in the form of K1 supports normal blood clotting.* Much of K1 is converted to K2 in the body. Vitamin
K2 (as MK-4) activates a protein that binds newly absorbed calcium and helps integrate it into the bones and
teeth.* At the same time, K2 may help prevent calcium deposits in the arteries.*
Geranylgeraniol (GG) supports the production of vitamin K2 (as MK-4) in the body.* Our body’s production of
GG generally declines during aging. In addition, the use of certain medications (particularly for treating high
cholesterol and osteoporosis) can inhibit GG production.
Recommended Use: Take one softgel per day or as directed by your health-care practitioner.
Warning: Vitamin K may adversely interact with anticoagulation drugs known as blood thinners. Consult your health-care practitioner before using this
product if you are taking Coumadin, warfarin, or any other anticoagulant medications.
DeltaGold® and GG-Gold™ are trademarks of American River Nutrition, LLC and protected by U.S. Patents 6,350,453; 8,586,109; and 7,989,006.

product.title: Melatonin SRT™ - 60 tablets
product.description: Melatonin SRT™ provides 6 mg of the hormone melatonin in a sustained-release tablet. As a supplement, melatonin is useful for regulating sleep and the body’s daily rhythmic cycle. Various factors may cause melatonin levels to become low, such as inadequate dietary intake of its precursor tryptophan, low levels of serotonin, normal aging, insufficient exposure to natural light, and certain medications. Due to melatonin’s relatively short half-life in the body, a sustained-release formula may be more suitable for those who experience difficulty staying asleep throughout the night.

product.title: Slow Motion Melatonin - 60 tablets
product.description:
With 1.2 mg per tablet , Slow Motion Melatonin provides a moderate dose of melatonin and is easy to adjust to individual needs. The tablets are produced with a so-called lipid matrix technology, which ensures the release of the active ingredient over a longer period of time and also protects the melatonin from oxidation by gastric acid.

The body synchronizes the release of endogenous melatonin with the duration of the night. Conventional melatonin preparations are characterized by a rapid release, which leads to a sudden increase to supraphysiological values ​​about 1 to 2 hours after ingestion. After that, the mirror goes down again.
Slow Motion is released continuously in very small amounts, just as it is released physiologically in the body.

product.title: Source of Life® Garden Vitamin D3 Organic - 60 capsules
product.description:
Source of Life Garden Vitamin D3
provides 2,500 IU (62.5 mcg) of natural vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) from six edible mushrooms in a nutrient-rich, plant-based whole food base.
Source of Life (S.o.L.) Garden stands for yeast-free and natural, certified organic U.S. nutrients, making it the gold standard for wholesome nutritional supplements.
S.o.L. Garden supplies selected plants that naturally contain individual nutrients in increased concentrations. They are accompanied by all enzymes, phytonutrients and co-factors in the natural quantities and ratios that together determine the effect. Humans have adapted to this form in the course of evolution. The result is excellent absorption and high utility for the body.
Vitamin D is a vitamin that the body can produce on its own. Vitamin D synthesis takes place in the skin with the help of sunlight. That's why vitamin D is also known as the sunshine vitamin.
In the months with little sunshine, the sun's rays are too low for sufficient vitamin D production, so that a deficiency can develop. Therefore, supplementation with vitamin D is a useful extra for many people, especially in winter.
Our body needs vitamin D and calcium not only for strong bones and teeth, but also for a functioning immune system and the maintenance of muscle strength. As a prophylaxis for osteoporosis, an adequate supply of vitamin D is especially important for older people. Winter depression is also related to vitamin D status.
Source of Life Garden™ is 100% natural, wholesome, vegan and certified organic.
Hint:
Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

Standardized broccoli seed and mustard seed extract provide sulforaphane glucosinolate and myrosinase enzyme, respectively, to promote maximal conversion to the beneficial compound sulforaphane, which supports normal detoxification pathways and estrogen metabolism. Vitamins B6, B12, and folate promote proper cell differentiation. Magnesium and calcium are included to help support bone and hormone health. Standardized trans-resveratrol and EGCG from decaffeinated green tea are phytonutrients that support overall antioxidant status.

product.title: Source of Life® Men - 60 tablets
product.description:
What is Source of Life®?
Source of Life products are based on a nutritionally balanced combination of vitamins, minerals, secondary plant substances, herbal and wholefood concentrates. There are special compositions for the requirements of special life situations, such as pregnancy, or certain groups of people such as men and women. In addition, iron-free variants of the products are also offered. Source of Life has been one of the best-selling multinationals in the U.S. market since 1986.
Source of Life® Men
has been specially designed to meet the needs of active men. Since men are extremely rare to have an iron deficiency, iron has been omitted from this formula. Essential substances such as zinc, saw palmetto, alpha-lipoic acid and pumpkin seeds, bioflavonoids, lipids, plant pigments and amino acids are abundant.
Extra energy
To support energy levels, Source of Life® Men contains a broad spectrum of B vitamins, including B12 and B2 (riboflavin). In addition, it contains the antioxidants vitamin C, vitamin E, zinc and selenium, which protect the body from environmental aggressors. Vitamin D3 contributes to the normal function of the immune system and supports the bones as well as the muscles.
Source of Life® Men as a tablet
Source of Life® Men by NaturesPlus is a comprehensive multivitamin supplement for men. The product contains 60/120 tablets per package.
Discover our other
Multivitamins

Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: Mega B-100 - 90 tablets
product.description:
Mega B-100 is a yeast-free, delayed-release B complex. A B-complex consists of a series of water-soluble vitamins, each of which has its own effect and which works synergistically as a complex. All B vitamins are involved in the release of energy and play an important role in the nervous system.

The B-complex contributes to the normal growth of the skin, hair and mucous membranes, as well as to the regulation of hormonal activity. It supports the formation of red blood cells and can also be used to support mental functions.

product.title: Adrenal POWER Powder® - 450 g powder
product.description: Dr. Wilson's Adrenal POWER Powder is a caffeine-free energy booster for people on the go. It combines select nutrients, adaptogenic herbs, and glandular extracts from Dr. Wilson’s Adrenal Fatigue Protocol® supplements. This product includes vitamins for energy, featuring a hearty B complex, and adaptogenic herbs to support mood and stamina. It offers an energy boost without caffeine, and the flavor tastes great in milk, juice, or smoothies. The adrenal glands and the hormones they produce play a significant role in generating and sustaining energy in the body. Adrenal POWER Powder is designed to provide a quick energy booster and targeted adrenal support during times of stress.
